title: Ending the Energy Stalemate: A Bipartisan Strategy to Meet America's Energy Challenges
summary: The report contains detailed policy recommendations for addressing oil security, climate change, natural gas supply, the future of nuclear energy, and other long-term challenges, and is backed by more than 30 original research studies.
body: Note Committee Members: Marilyn Brown, Ralph Cavanagh, Archie W. Dunham, Rodney Ellis, Leo Gerard, F. Henry Habicht, John P. Holdren, Mario J. Molina, Sharon L. Nelson, William K. Reilly, John W. Rowe, Philip R. Sharp, Linda Stuntz, Susan Tierney, R. James Woolsey and Martin B. Zimmerman. Executive Director: Jason Grumet Read the NCEP's official press release The latest from Belfer See more Recommended citation Holdren, John, William K. Reilly, John W.
